docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $813.13 FILED BY GUILLEN,CESAR A. AS TO DEFENDANT TOLAND STREET AUTO WRECKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
